name: fireflies
description: The Fireflies app brings your meetings and knowledge directly into Codex.

interface.shortDescription: The Fireflies app brings your meetings and knowledge directly into Codex.
interface.longDescription:
The Fireflies app brings your meetings and knowledge directly into Codex.

Analyze any conversation—sales, customer success, product, recruiting—for insights, action items, and sentiment. Track feature requests and pain points, update CRMs or systems of record, and instantly retrieve context from your organization's meetings.

With Fireflies and Codex, centralize your company knowledge and turn every conversation into searchable, actionable insights.
defaultPrompt: Summarize our conversation history with Acme so far
